name: buaa-thesis-checker
description: BUAA thesis checking and document translation skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 北航论文格式、内容与综合评审技能包
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for BUAA thesis format checking, academic content review, comprehensive thesis review comments, and Chinese-to-English Word document translation.
defaultPrompt: 检查这篇北航论文的格式并生成报告。
审核这篇论文的贡献、创新和实验。
生成北航学位论文综合评审意见。
